plugins.name: DMX Numeric
plugins.author: Filip Olszewski
plugins.description: Numeric DMX channel writer. Assign a fixture channel, type the value or use a MIDI encoder. Supports Apply button and MIDI/OSC/HID input bindings.

plugins.name: Infinity Encoder
plugins.author: Filip Olszewski
plugins.description: Relative rotary encoder controlling 4 independent DMX channels (banks A/B/C/D). Three sensitivity levels. Circular drag interaction.

plugins.name: Multi Button
plugins.author: Filip Olszewski
plugins.description: Cyclic multi-function launcher. Each button cycles through a list of QLC+ functions. Supports long-press context menu, optional OFF step, channel monitoring, per-entry icons.
